// WARNING: This file is automatically generated. Any work done here will be lost when docgen is run.
use crate::lang::{
    lib::ui::ui_types::emphasis::emphasis_model::Emphasis,
    runtime::{state::conundrum_error_variant::ConundrumModalResult, traits::conundrum_input::ConundrumInput},
};

use winnow::token::literal;
use winnow::{Parser, combinator::alt};


pub fn emphasis_string(input: &mut ConundrumInput) -> ConundrumModalResult<Emphasis> {
    alt(({% for emphasis in conundrum::lang::lib::ui::ui_types::emphasis::emphasis_model::Emphasis::iter() %}
    literal("{{emphasis}}").value(Emphasis::{{emphasis | title}}),
    {% endfor %}
    )).parse_next(input)
}
